reason: Finish work checklist
Code quality check spec
Check implementation against PRD scope, acceptance criteria, non-goals, and required tests
Verify backend files stay in existing security/config/util boundaries
Check no duplicate business path and required backend verification
Verify BotGuard 403/429 response shape and frontend compatibility
Review new logs/headers do not expose secrets or noisy public request logs
Verify no hidden schema changes or DB side effects
Verify no second API wrapper or duplicate public app shell
Check frontend changes are narrow and verified if any
Verify loader/effect changes preserve hooks and cancellation conventions
Check no duplicated server state or stale auth behavior regression
Verify API payload/error/header handling remains compatible
Check reuse decision and duplicate risk
Validate Good/Base/Bad and tests across backend/frontend/infra
Review risk scoring preserves malicious high-frequency protection
Check 403/429 ApiResponse compatibility and auth boundary
Check config defaults are safe and documented if changed
Verify proxy/IP behavior does not create spoofing or collapse clients
Check Nginx forwarding, SPA fallback, and existing CSP/upload behavior remain intact
Verify Docker config aligns with Nginx and non-Docker behavior
Check no direct fetch/API wrapper duplication and BotGuard error parsing remains compatible
Verify boot requests and auth restore behavior stay compatible
Verify route-specific public page behavior and analytics remain scoped
